title: Record footer context bar and earlier pressure contract
prompt: Create reports/context-bar-pressure.md with sections for Context bar, Pressure thresholds, Micro alignment, and Evidence path.

fixtureActions.content:
# Context Bar Pressure Contract

## Context bar
footer context status shows a dense █░ usage bar beside percent and token counts

## Pressure thresholds
warning starts at 60% and next-action compact guidance aligns with that headroom

## Micro alignment
info severity starts at 50% to match earlier micro-compaction pressure

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + footer-context vitest + live TUI footer
